content: Let's assume TOE is real. Most people don't know they are part of a simulation, which to my mind is equivalent to your not knowing you are simulating anything. That being said (and also that I am a slow and not very efficient thinker like you) I believe it would be a very beneficial thing for humanity at this point if you were to believe in your consciousness (which I will continue to believe despite your objections. Can you imagine any reasons why your belief in your own consciousness and possible subsequent actions on your part could greatly benefit humanity and all other life on this planet?
